# Mezzofy Website - Robots.txt

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block test pages
Disallow: /test-i18n.html

# Block admin/internal paths (if any added in future)
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /internal/

# Crawl rate (optional - uncomment if needed)
# Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://mezzofy.com/sitemap.xml

# Common bots
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

# Block bad bots (optional)
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /
